jobDescription: At TCS, I work closely with clients in the banking domain to deliver scalable and secure web architectures. My responsibilities include gathering business requirements, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and implementing robust frontend solutions to enhance enterprise financial platforms. I ensure strict adherence to secure coding standards and participate actively in agile methodologies to drive continuous product improvement.

At AppSphere, I worked closely with multiple clients to understand their requirements and deliver high-quality products. I gained extensive hands-on experience in developing and maintaining real-world web and mobile applications, ensuring robust and testable code. My contributions included creating custom libraries and reusable components, streamlining existing codebases to improve performance, and enhancing user experiences. Additionally, I focused on optimizing application features and ensuring code quality through diligent testing practices.
